/cwe/weakness/232.Name: Improper Handling of Undefined Values
/cwe/weakness/232.Description: The product does not handle or incorrectly handles when a value is not defined or supported for the associated parameter, field, or argument name.

Entries.IntroText: In this example, an address parameter is read and trimmed of whitespace.

Entries.BodyText: If the value of the address parameter is null (undefined), the servlet will throw a NullPointerException when the trim() is attempted.
